NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL.description: Your Supabase project URL (from Settings > API)

NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY.description: Your Supabase anon key (from Settings > API)

SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY.description: Your Supabase service role key (from Settings > API) - KEEP SECRET

NEXTAUTH_SECRET.description: Random secret for NextAuth - generate any random string

NEXTAUTH_URL.description: Your Vercel deployment URL - Vercel sets this automatically
